Frequently Asked Questions

How does the free trial work?

Our free trial lets you generate 2 basic AI room designs with watermarks. No credit card required. If you love it, you can upgrade to a paid plan for full access.

Can I cancel anytime?

Yes! You can cancel your subscription at any time. You'll continue to have access until the end of your billing period.

Do you offer refunds?

We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee on all annual plans. If you're not satisfied, we'll give you a full refund.

DreamRoom AI

Making interior design accessible to everyone.
